strengths: Extensive fullstack experience with TypeScript, React, and Node.js across multiple domains
Proven ability to own and ship complex systems, including open-source GIS platforms and AI-agent tooling
Strong architectural mindset with demonstrated use of testing, CI/CD, and clean code practices
concerns: Job titles (e.g., Staff/Senior) and responsibilities appear significantly ahead of entry-level expectations
Limited explicit mention of PostgreSQL, Nest.js, or AWS services directly tied to the target domain
German language proficiency is only basic, while high on-site presence in Berlin is required
response.justification: The candidate brings deep fullstack expertise and architectural discipline aligned with the role’s technical needs, but their senior-level track record and limited German proficiency raise questions about fit for an entry-level, on-site position in a domain requiring close team collaboration.
